title: Craft Time
description: Synthesizing items requires time and different levels of workbenches and furnaces
body: 合成物品需要消耗时间，不用等级工作台合成速度不同。 等级由低到高为燧石工作台、铜工作台、铁工作台、钻石工作台、下届合金工作台。 以及不同等级的熔炉：粘土熔炉、黑曜石熔炉、地狱岩熔炉。 Synthesizing items requires time, and the synthesis speed varies depending on the level of the workbench. The grades from low to high are flint workbench, copper workbench, iron workbench, diamond workbench, and the next alloy workbench. And different levels of furnaces: clay furnaces, obsidian furnaces, hellrock furnaces Thank jingshen_sn2's Craft Takes Time The Modpack DangerousWorld.
